title: agrostophyllum elongatum
intro: Agrostophyllum elongatum, also known as the Elongated Orchid or the Borneo Spiranthera, is a species of flowering plant in the family Orchidaceae. It is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The plant is valued for its health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating pain, and treating various infections, and can be used to treat conditions such as respiratory issues and gastrointestinal problems. Agrostophyllum elongatum can be prepared as a herbal infusion, decoction, or tincture, and is often used in traditional medicine in Southeast Asia, particularly in Indonesia and Malaysia.
